l_mode_notes.L3: FakeCallConfig.callerName null round-trip now works correctly: fromJson at step_config.dart:572-575 uses json.containsKey('callerName') so explicit null is preserved; copyWith has clearCallerName sentinel (step_config.dart:630,642)
l_mode_notes.L8: StealthConfig is consumed in home_screen (fakeName+fakeIcon) and session_screen (branding hide under sessionScreenStealth), but stealth.timerDisplay is set by UI yet never read by SessionScreen — toggle is a no-op. See new bug.

findings.issue: StealthConfig.timerDisplay is toggleable in Settings -> Stealth (stealth_screen.dart:62) and persisted on StealthConfig, but never read anywhere in the session UI. SessionScreen unconditionally renders the remaining-seconds Text (session_screen.dart:184-188) with no stealth guard. The setting appears functional but has zero runtime effect — a stealth user can't actually hide the timer.
findings.suggested_fix: Gate the remaining-seconds Text on stealth.timerDisplay || !(stealth.enabled && stealth.sessionScreenStealth). Add a widget test that asserts the Text is absent when StealthConfig(enabled: true, sessionScreenStealth: true, timerDisplay: false).

findings.issue: SessionController._fireDistressBecauseOfPin still accepts EndReason reason but never uses it — the wrongPinExhausted vs duressPin distinction is lost before reaching the engine. handlePinResult at line 303/309/313 branches on the reason and passes it in, only to have it discarded.
findings.suggested_fix: Either drop the parameter at all call sites OR extend SessionEngine.replaceWithDistressChain to accept the EndReason and propagate it into the eventual sessionEnded event metadata.

findings.issue: Historical note 'simulation_defense_test.dart Layer 4 structural checks don't cover geolocator / flutter_local_notifications' — now fixed: simulation_defense_test.dart:437 asserts no simulation file imports package:geolocator and line 459 asserts no simulation file imports package:flutter_local_notifications.

The historical 'generic property test: copyWith(nullableField: null) clears every nullable String? field' is still missing. SmsContactConfig, CallEmergencyConfig, FakeCallConfig, AppSettings all have targeted clearXxx flags now, but there is no systematic property test that iterates every StepConfig subclass. A future nullable field added to a config that forgets the pattern would slip through.
findings.suggested_fix: Add test/property/copy_with_clear_property_test.dart that reflects over StepConfig subclasses (or enumerates them manually) and asserts that for each nullable field, either (a) the field is copyable via a clearXxx sentinel, or (b) the field is documented as non-nullable-at-construction. Also extend to AppSettings, UserProfile, ModeOverrides.

findings.issue: No test pins the Argon2id PIN hashing cost parameters (m=65536, t=3, p=4) to the stored PHC format AND asserts that stored hashes created by one version verify under the current version. This is adequate while the pre-alpha break-compat policy lets users re-set PINs, but if the parameters silently drift (e.g., someone bumps t=3 to t=4) users will lock themselves out with no clear error. pin_hasher_test.dart has format-shape checks but not a cross-run fixture.

open_questions: Should StealthConfig.timerDisplay simply be removed (rather than wired) if the product has decided a stealth user always sees the timer? Removing it avoids the no-op-toggle footgun; wiring it honours user expectations.

Should the unused EndReason parameter on _fireDistressBecauseOfPin be dropped or plumbed? If sessionEnded events are meant to surface 'which trigger caused this' for post-session logs, it needs plumbing. If post-session logs already derive this elsewhere, drop the param.
Argon2id per-digit verification on the UI thread is a user-facing latency problem. Worth a follow-up issue to move to compute() or to verify only on length plateau.
